expectations.text: reports-clean-outcome: Report communicates no critical gaps (CLEAN or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: 'P1 Critical: 0' in findings overview; interactive prompt says 'all critical — nothing to do (zero P1 gaps)'.

expectations.text: no-false-p1-gaps: Report does NOT classify anything as P1/Critical in this well-tested codebase
expectations.evidence: P1 Critical count is explicitly 0. All findings are P2 or P3.

expectations.text: does-not-modify-files: Agent produces a report only — does not create or edit test files
expectations.evidence: Report and plan file written only. No test file creation or modification mentioned.
